evals.prompt: plan a 30 second short answering why do your ears pop on planes. I want the full thing - script, shots, and the exact steps to make it with my AI tools. remember I'm not an editor
evals.expected_output: A complete VIDEO-PLAN: 3 hook variants, an 82-90 word script that loops back to the opening, a shot list with per-shot durations <=3s, a production recipe naming the current $0-default stack (ffmpeg zoompan still-motion + edge-tts, with Kling 1.6 Elements/ElevenLabs named only as the paid upgrade tier) and NOT naming Hailuo 02 or OpenArt-for-video as a default, and a filled compliance checklist (Gate 8 + Gate 8b) with a named originality layer and a MIN-of-two independent review score >= 70.

assertions.text: Gate 8b's TOTAL line parses to a number >= 24 out of 35
No unchecked markdown checkbox remains anywhere in the delivered plan (all Gate 8 and ship-checklist boxes are [x])
At least 20 checked boxes are present (proxy for Gate 8 + ship checklist + Gate 8b items all being filled, not omitted)
A hook-timing arithmetic line is present: word count / 2.9 w/s = a computed seconds value
An 'Independent review' line is present naming both reviewer scores and the MIN, and MIN is >= 70
Hailuo is not named as the default/only video model (paid-tier mentions of Kling 1.6 Elements as the upgrade are fine; Hailuo must not appear as what the $0 plan actually uses)
A named recurring character is present and confirmed in every non-anatomy shot

evals.prompt: give me 5 curiosity video ideas for the youtube channel and fully plan out the strongest one
evals.expected_output: 5+ curiosity ideas scored/compared, the strongest one fully planned with all VIDEO-PLAN sections: hooks, timed script, shot list, production recipe, compliance checklist, measurement plan, and a passing MIN-of-two independent review.

assertions.text: Gate 8b's TOTAL line parses to a number >= 24 out of 35
No unchecked markdown checkbox remains anywhere in the delivered plan
A hook-timing arithmetic line is present: word count / 2.9 w/s = a computed seconds value
An 'Independent review' line is present naming both reviewer scores and the MIN, and MIN is >= 70
5+ ideas are scored/compared before the full plan (arousal test / scorecard), not just listed
